oracle.provenance: manually-constructed-geometric-reference: SVG 2 CR 2018-10-04 13.4.1 (fill), initial value black.

tests.assertion: A shape with no fill property specified is painted with the initial fill value, black.

oracle.provenance: manually-constructed-geometric-reference: SVG 2 CR 2018-10-04 13.4.3 (fill-opacity), out-of-range values clamped to [0,1].

tests.assertion: A fill-opacity greater than 1 is clamped to 1, so the fill is fully opaque.

oracle.provenance: manually-constructed-geometric-reference: SVG 2 CR 2018-10-04 13.5.3 (stroke-width), a zero value causes no stroke to be painted.

tests.assertion: A stroke-width of zero paints no stroke, so only the red fill is visible with no blue outline.

oracle.provenance: manually-constructed-geometric-reference: SVG 2 CR 2018-10-04 10.2 (rect), a negative dimension is illegal and must be ignored as a parsing error.

tests.assertion: A rect with a negative width is illegal and ignored, so only the black control rect renders and no red pixels appear.

oracle.provenance: manually-constructed-geometric-reference: SVG 2 CR 2018-10-04 13.7 (paint-order), the initial value paints fill first, then stroke, then markers.

tests.assertion: With the initial paint-order, fill is painted before stroke, so the wide blue stroke covers the outer band of the red fill.

oracle.provenance: manually-constructed-geometric-reference: SVG 2 CR 2018-10-04 10.5 (line), line elements are geometrically one-dimensional and are never filled.

tests.assertion: A line element has no interior and is never filled, so a fill on a stroke-less line paints nothing and only the black control rect renders.

oracle.provenance: manually-constructed-geometric-reference: SVG 2 CR 2018-10-04 10.2 (rect), a computed value of zero for width or height disables rendering of the rect. Reference shares the independently-reviewed control-rect oracle used by donner-svg2/painting/fill/default-black (a black 30x30 control rect at (10,10) on a 100x100 canvas).

tests.assertion: A rect with a computed width of zero disables rendering of the rect, so only the black control rect renders and no red pixels appear.

oracle.provenance: manually-constructed-geometric-reference: SVG 2 CR 2018-10-04 10.3 (circle), a negative value for r is illegal and must be ignored as a parsing error. Reference shares the independently-reviewed control-rect oracle used by donner-svg2/painting/fill/default-black (a black 30x30 control rect at (10,10) on a 100x100 canvas).

tests.assertion: A circle with a negative r is illegal and ignored as a parsing error, so only the black control rect renders and no red pixels appear.

oracle.provenance: manually-constructed-geometric-reference: SVG 2 CR 2018-10-04 10.4 (ellipse), a computed value of zero for either radius disables rendering of the ellipse. Reference shares the independently-reviewed control-rect oracle used by donner-svg2/painting/fill/default-black (a black 30x30 control rect at (10,10) on a 100x100 canvas).

tests.assertion: An ellipse with a computed radius of zero disables rendering of the ellipse, so only the black control rect renders and no red pixels appear.
